title: I'm Going to Break Your Heart
original_title: I'm Going to Break Your Heart
overview: The long creative and romantic relationship between Canadian musicians Chantal Kreviazuk and Raine Maida is explored in this profile filmed on France's Saint Pierre et Miquelon island.
